box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.font:
Cache-Aside Pattern:
1. Check Redis (cache hit?)
2. Miss → Query PostgreSQL
3. Populate cache (TTL 5m)
4. Return data

div.font:
Response flows back:
Service → Handler → Middleware
→ Nginx → Client
